notes: Solid Tetris implementation with SRS kicks, DAS, hold, ghost piece, and 7-bag randomizer; minor concern with soft drop interval calculation (baseInterval/20 is unusual) and the I-piece spawn offset may cause slight visual quirks, but overall very playable.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris clone with hold, ghost, queue, scoring, and rotation kicks, but it is not flawless due to likely imperfect SRS/lock behavior and some ruleset deviations from polished guideline Tetris.
